title: Multiproto
description: Protocol translation mod for Babric and StationAPI allowing Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 clients to connect to earlier Beta server versions.
body:
Protocol translation mod for [Babric](https://babric.github.io/) and [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) allowing Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 clients to connect to earlier Beta server versions.

## Requirements

- [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)
- [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)
- [Glass Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-config-api)
- [ModMenu Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-beta) (Required for in-game config)
- [MojangFixStationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/mojangfix-stationapi-edition) (Optional)
- [HowManyItems Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/howmanyitems-fabric) (Optional)


## Features

#### Join previous Beta versions from a Beta 1.7.3 client
![Protocol version list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1271e91f278383e2cb32e83e3d942fdbf7c32232.png)

#### Visual parity
![Screenshot taken on AlphaPlace showing visuals altered to match the version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ld9JTjz1/images/8d339d670287a9c6dbc593605347327998b514d5.png)

#### MojangFixStationAPI integration
![Server list with protocol versions listed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9695accab8384657311a205a0170c591c27f02d4.png)

#### HowManyItems Fabric integration
![Side by side of Beta 1.0 and Beta 1.7 item lists](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b9e3a4d3792f6229d33c05a83e0ff80c53b6791.png)
